title: Citation
description: A grounded reference. No bare strings: every law-derived fact names its source and quotes the exact text. Mirrors engine/citation.py.

source_id.description: Stable id of the source (a source-*.md filename, solicitation id, or URL).

quote.description: Exact text relied upon (verbatim for golden_rule).

captured_at.description: ISO date/timestamp the quote was captured.
